Who I Am

About Me

Hello! I'm Nitya Patle, a B.Tech student specialising in Artificial Intelligence at JD College of Engineering and Management, Nagpur. I'm passionate about technology, innovation, and continuous learning.

My interests span Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Python Programming, and Web Development. I actively participate in internships, hackathons, workshops, and technical events to sharpen my practical skills.

I believe in learning by building — every project, no matter how small, pushes me a step closer to becoming an AI professional who creates impactful solutions for real-world challenges.

What I've Built

My Projects

7 hands-on projects spanning AI, machine learning, cybersecurity, and full-stack development — each one a real-world problem solved.

Featured
⚡ QUALITRON AI
QUALITRON_AI
An advanced AI-powered quality analysis and intelligent response platform. QUALITRON_AI integrates smart decision-making pipelines with automated quality checks, delivering precise, context-aware outputs for complex datasets and user queries.
PythonArtificial Intelligence NLPDecision Logic Data Analysis
Key Learning: Designing intelligent pipelines that combine rule-based logic with AI inference for quality-driven automated decision making.
Featured
🏋️ FitAI Pro
FitAI Pro — AI-Powered Fitness Trainer
A full-stack AI fitness application featuring real-time pose estimation, emotion & fatigue detection, injury risk analysis, and a voice coach powered by Claude AI. Built with React 18 on the frontend and Python FastAPI on the backend.
React 18FastAPI PythonPose Estimation Claude AIComputer Vision
Key Learning: Full-stack AI architecture — integrating real-time computer vision with an LLM voice coach and a responsive React frontend over a REST API.
💬 ChatBot
Rule-Based AI Chatbot
An intelligent rule-based chatbot built using pattern matching, keyword detection, and decision trees. Handles a wide range of user queries with context-aware multi-turn conversation logic and clean terminal/web interface.
PythonNLP Basics Pattern MatchingDecision Trees Chatbot Logic
Key Learning: Designing conversational AI flows using rule-based systems — understanding dialogue management, intent detection, and response generation before moving to neural approaches.
⭕ TicTacToe
Tic Tac Toe — AI Game
A classic Tic Tac Toe game with an unbeatable AI opponent powered by the Minimax algorithm with alpha-beta pruning. Features difficulty levels (Easy / Medium / Unbeatable), clean UI, and real-time move analysis.
PythonMinimax Algorithm Alpha-Beta PruningGame AI Logic Design
Key Learning: Core game-tree search algorithms — implementing Minimax with alpha-beta pruning to build an AI that plays optimally at every move.
👁️ ImageAI
Image Recognition by AI
A computer vision project that identifies and classifies objects in images using deep learning models. Supports real-time image capture, batch processing, and confidence-score output with labelled bounding box visualisation.
PythonComputer Vision Deep LearningCNN Google ColabNumPy
Key Learning: Building end-to-end image classification pipelines — from preprocessing and model loading to inference, confidence scoring, and visual output rendering.
🔐 PassVault
Password Manager with Encryption
A secure password manager that stores, retrieves, and manages credentials using AES encryption. Features master password protection, encrypted local storage, clipboard integration, and a clean interactive interface for safe credential handling.
PythonAES Encryption CryptographyCybersecurity Secure Storage
Key Learning: Practical cryptography — implementing symmetric encryption (AES) for secure data-at-rest storage and understanding the fundamentals of password security and key management.
🔗 HashSync
Smart Hash-Based System for Data Integration
A data integrity and deduplication system using smart hashing algorithms. Compares, verifies, and merges datasets efficiently using hash signatures — ensuring zero data duplication and fast lookups across large-scale data pipelines.
PythonHashing Algorithms Data StructuresData Integration SHA / MD5
Key Learning: Applying hashing for real-world data pipeline integrity — building fast deduplication logic and data verification systems using Python's cryptographic hash libraries.

Meta — AI Building AI

How AI Helped Build This Website

This portfolio was crafted with significant assistance from AI-powered tools — a fitting demonstration of the very subject I'm studying. From generating initial content drafts and structuring sections, to refining the design aesthetic and creating cohesive copy, AI streamlined a process that would otherwise take weeks into a polished result in a fraction of the time.

✍️
Content Generation
AI assisted in drafting About Me copy, project descriptions, and achievement write-ups that are clear, professional, and accurate.
🎨
Design Assistance
AI suggested the dark AI-themed colour palette, glassmorphism card style, and gradient accents that define this portfolio's aesthetic.
🏗️
Website Development
The complete HTML, CSS, and JavaScript codebase for this site was generated and refined with AI — demonstrating AI's power in software creation.
🗂️
Section Organisation
AI helped identify which sections a portfolio evaluator would find most compelling and organised them for maximum impact and readability.
